metadata.description: Explore roles at Todd. Our teams inspire, educate and enable people all over the world.
metadata.title: Careers at Todd

hero.title: Build the future of sustainable agriculture
hero.subtitle: Todd is building a team that embodies diversity of thought, experience and background.

landing.bridgeStatement: We are scientists, engineers, and builders who've created some of the most widely used technology in the world

values.heading: Values:
values.intro: These values define what we consider to be the most important things. They guide our decision-making. We believe that channeling these values is the most promising way to achieve our mission.
values.item1Body: Humility reminds us to recognize the limits of our own knowledge and to remain open to new ideas, perspectives, and the possibility of being wrong. This mindset influences our iterative approach to build, and the reintegration of feedback into our research.
values.item2Body: Building a company requires rigor and discipline, boundless imagination, and a deep sense of responsibility. We approach research and product development with respect for the transformative technology we are helping create, and the coupled benefits, changes, and risks that come along with it.
values.item3Body: We are a collaborative, intensely driven team operating at the highest level of performance. Innovation happens when the best ideas win. We seek to operate with the highest standards and strive to not be constrained by industry norms.
values.item4Body: Through our research we develop products that can transform how society thrives. Our technology reflects an internal culture of optimism for the future and stewardship of our mission.

operatingPrinciples.heading: Operating Principles:
operatingPrinciples.intro: These principles define how we work together. They are important for establishing our operating culture.
operatingPrinciples.item1Body: We believe in finding a way to do the things that matter. We give agency to individuals and teams to find an approach that works. Ideas come from anywhere, regardless of title or tenure.
operatingPrinciples.item2Body: We look to find creative solutions, even if sometimes imperfect, over rigidity and control. Our approach to solving problems is based on best principles (first principles and best practices).
operatingPrinciples.item3Body: We believe in finding a way to do the things that matter. We give agency to individuals and teams to find an approach that works. Ideas come from anywhere, regardless of title or tenure.
operatingPrinciples.item4Body: We are hard workers who are here to make an impact on the world. This intensity and resilience are pivotal to the mission, while clarity and focus enable us to make hard decisions.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.subtitle: We want you to do the most impactful work of your career with the confidence that you and the people you care about most are supported.
benefits.employeesBullets:
Health, dental, and vision insurance
Mental healthcare support and services
Company sponsored retirement plan
Domestic conference budget for each employee
benefits.lifeBullets:
24-week paid birth-parent leave, WFH for up to 4 weeks after leave
20-week paid parental leave, WFH for up to 4 weeks after leave
Life and AD&D insurance
Generous paid time off to recharge, care for yourself and loved ones, and handle life's moments
benefits.cultureBullets:
Annual learning & development stipend
Employee resource groups
Team-driven celebrations and events
Daily breakfast, lunch, and dinner
6 coaching sessions, for you and your dependents

residency.heading: Todd Residency
residency.body: Our early talent programs offers a chance to make a direct impact at Todd and contribute to Todd's growth journey. We welcome curious, driven people early in their professional journey through.
residency.imageAlt: Two Todd teammates talking in a bright office lounge

talent.heading: Early talent
talent.body: We welcome curious, driven people early in their professional journey to make a direct impact at Todd and contribute to Todd's own growth journey.
talent.imageAlt: Early-career teammates collaborating in a modern office

quote.text: My colleagues recognize the importance of what they're building and genuinely care about the outcomes in ways that surpass previous scientific breakthroughs.
quote.attribution: Oscar Gaske, Founding Engineer at Todd

jobListings.empty: No postings are listed here right now. See our Todd University externship program on the main careers page.

disclaimers.0: Todd is a equal opportunity employer in the regions where we operate.
disclaimers.1: Todd Agriscience, Inc. and our business entities are committed to offering an equal opportunity for all applicants. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, marital status, ancestry, neurotype, disability, veteran status, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other category protected by local law.
disclaimers.2: If you need additional assistance throughout the hiring process related to a health condition or there is something our team can do to enable a more accessible experience, please notify our team at support@toddagriscience.com
disclaimers.3: Under the U.S. Transparency in Coverage act, Todd is required to provide U.S. pricing information to U.S. consumers before they receive care under our insurance plans. To review Todd’s U.S. medical insurance pricing structure, please click here: https://transparency-in-coverage.collectivehealth.com/index.html.
disclaimers.4: To learn more about how we process your personal information and your rights in regards to your personal information as a Todd Applicant, please visit our Privacy Policy.

externship.title: Early Careers at Todd
externship.subtitle: The most important decision of your career is choosing where it starts. Our accelerated externship for outlier early talent is designed to build strong foundations for a lifetime of learning and achievement.

program.title: Externship Accelerator
program.description: The Todd Externship Program is a 4-week accelerator that provides students with hands-on experience in a startup environment. Paired into small teams, you will work together to ship a real project, and “graduate” with a diploma you actually earned.

applyClosed.title: Applications are currently closed.
applyClosed.description: We will be accepting applications for the Summer ‘26 program in the coming months.
applyClosed.linkText: Follow us on LinkedIn for career opportunities.

applyOpen.title: Applications for Spring ‘26 now open.
applyOpen.description: We are accepting applications for the Spring ‘26 program. Apply now to join our team.
